case_title: SFMUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION vs. CATO, BERLIN

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SFMUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATO, BERLIN $3,462.54 PRINCIPAL, $3,439.77 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,916.31, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE # 860966; ALL FURTHER PROCESS TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SAECTION ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SFMUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT CATO, BERLIN
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF, AND APPL FOR, ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SFMUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION SERVED FEB-17-1995, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CATO, BERLIN
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON 27-MAR-95 UNLESS DEFT MOVES TO MODIFY OR VACATE JUDGMENT.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CATO, BERLIN
